description.en: A versatile fruit often used as a vegetable. Thrives in warm conditions with consistent watering.
description.fr: Un fruit polyvalent souvent utilise comme legume. Prospere dans des conditions chaudes avec un arrosage regulier.

tips: Pinch off suckers for bigger fruits
Water at the base, not the leaves
Add calcium to prevent blossom end rot
Stake or cage plants early for support

description.en: A root vegetable that grows best in loose, deep soil. Sweet and nutritious when freshly harvested.
description.fr: Un legume-racine qui pousse mieux dans un sol meuble et profond. Sucre et nutritif lorsqu'il est fraichement recolte.

tips: Keep soil consistently moist for even growth
Thin seedlings to proper spacing
Avoid rocky soil to prevent forking
Harvest when tops are about 1cm in diameter

description.en: A cool-season crop perfect for salads. Quick to grow and can be harvested multiple times.
description.fr: Une culture de saison fraiche parfaite pour les salades. Pousse rapidement et peut etre recoltee plusieurs fois.

tips: Harvest outer leaves for continuous production
Provide afternoon shade in hot weather
Sow seeds every 2 weeks for continuous harvest
Bolts quickly in hot weather

description.en: An aromatic herb essential in Mediterranean cuisine. Loves warmth and pairs perfectly with tomatoes.
description.fr: Une herbe aromatique essentielle dans la cuisine mediterraneenne. Aime la chaleur et se marie parfaitement avec les tomates.

tips: Pinch flower buds to promote leaf growth
Harvest from the top down
Bring indoors before first frost
Never refrigerate fresh basil leaves

description.en: Colorful sweet peppers that love heat. Start indoors and transplant after last frost.
description.fr: Des poivrons doux et colores qui aiment la chaleur. Commencer a l'interieur et transplanter apres les dernieres gelees.

tips: Start seeds indoors 8 weeks before last frost
Use black plastic mulch to warm soil
Pick first fruits early to encourage more production
Peppers change color as they ripen

description.en: A prolific summer squash that produces abundantly. One plant can feed a family.
description.fr: Une courge d'ete prolifique qui produit abondamment. Un seul plant peut nourrir une famille.

tips: Harvest when 15-20cm long for best flavor
Check plants daily as they grow fast
Hand-pollinate if fruit is not setting
Mulch heavily to retain moisture

description.en: A refreshing vine crop perfect for salads and pickling. Needs consistent moisture.
description.fr: Une culture grimpante rafraichissante parfaite pour les salades et les cornichons.

tips: Provide a trellis for vertical growing
Pick regularly to encourage production
Water consistently to prevent bitter taste
Harvest in the morning for crispest fruit

description.en: A kitchen staple that stores well. Plant sets for easiest growing experience.
description.fr: Un incontournable de la cuisine qui se conserve bien. Planter des bulbilles pour une culture plus facile.

tips: Stop watering when tops begin to fall over
Cure in a dry, warm place for storage
Choose long-day or short-day varieties for your region
Mulch to suppress weeds and retain moisture

description.en: A flavorful bulb that is incredibly easy to grow. Plant in autumn for summer harvest.
description.fr: Un bulbe savoureux incroyablement facile a cultiver. Planter en automne pour une recolte en ete.

tips: Plant individual cloves pointy side up
Mulch heavily in cold climates
Cut scapes in spring to direct energy to bulb
Harvest when lower leaves start to brown

description.en: One of the fastest vegetables to grow. Perfect for beginners and impatient gardeners.
description.fr: L'un des legumes les plus rapides a cultiver. Parfait pour les debutants et les jardiniers impatients.

tips: Sow every 2 weeks for continuous harvest
Harvest promptly to avoid woodiness
Thin seedlings to prevent crowding
Great as row markers for slow-germinating crops

description.en: A nutrient-rich leafy green that prefers cool weather. Bolts quickly in heat.
description.fr: Un legume vert riche en nutriments qui prefere le temps frais. Monte en graines rapidement par temps chaud.

tips: Grows best in cool weather below 24C
Use shade cloth in warm weather
Harvest outer leaves for continuous production
Rich in iron and vitamins A and C

description.en: A cool-weather climber that fixes nitrogen in soil. Sweet and delicious fresh from the vine.
description.fr: Une plante grimpante de saison fraiche qui fixe l'azote dans le sol. Doux et delicieux frais de la vigne.

tips: Provide support for climbing varieties
Plant as soon as soil can be worked
Inoculate seeds with rhizobia for better yields
Pick frequently to encourage more pods

description.en: A warm-season crop that fixes nitrogen. Both bush and pole varieties available.
description.fr: Une culture de saison chaude qui fixe l'azote. Varietes naines et a rames disponibles.

tips: Do not soak seeds before planting
Avoid working around wet plants to prevent disease
Pick beans when pencil-thin for best flavor
Pole beans yield more than bush varieties

description.en: A staple root crop that grows underground. Hill soil around plants as they grow.
description.fr: Un tubercule de base qui pousse sous terre. Butter la terre autour des plants au fur et a mesure de la croissance.

tips: Hill soil around stems to increase yield
Do not eat green potatoes
Cut seed potatoes to have 2-3 eyes each
Cure harvested potatoes in a dark place

description.en: A heat-loving vegetable with beautiful purple fruits. Requires warm soil to thrive.
description.fr: Un legume qui aime la chaleur avec de beaux fruits violets. Necessite un sol chaud pour prosperer.

tips: Harvest when skin is glossy and firm
Use row covers to protect from flea beetles
Mulch to keep roots cool and moist
Start indoors 8-10 weeks before last frost

description.en: A cool-season crop that forms tight heads. Great for coleslaw, sauerkraut, and stir-fries.
description.fr: Une culture de saison fraiche qui forme des tetes serrees. Ideal pour la salade de chou et la choucroute.

tips: Use collars to protect from cabbage root fly
Net against butterflies and moths
Water consistently for even head formation
Harvest when heads feel firm and solid

description.en: A nutritious brassica with edible flower heads. Prefers cool growing conditions.
description.fr: Un brassica nutritif avec des tetes de fleurs comestibles. Prefere des conditions de culture fraiches.

tips: Harvest before flower buds open
Side shoots produce after main head is cut
Rich in vitamins C and K
Use row covers against cabbage worms

description.en: A warm-season grass crop. Plant in blocks rather than rows for proper pollination.
description.fr: Une culture de graminee de saison chaude. Planter en blocs plutot qu'en rangs pour une pollinisation correcte.

tips: Plant in blocks of at least 4x4 for pollination
Silk turns brown when ears are ready
Cook immediately after picking for best sweetness
Grows well in the Three Sisters method with beans and squash

description.en: A sweet perennial fruit that spreads by runners. Perfect for borders and containers.
description.fr: Un fruit vivace sucre qui se propage par stolons. Parfait pour les bordures et les conteneurs.

tips: Remove runners for larger berries
Mulch with straw to keep fruit clean
Remove first year flowers for stronger plants
Net against birds when berries ripen

description.en: A woody Mediterranean herb with aromatic needle-like leaves. Drought tolerant once established.
description.fr: Une herbe mediterraneenne ligneuse avec des feuilles aromatiques en forme d'aiguilles. Tolerante a la secheresse une fois etablie.

tips: Prefers well-drained soil
Prune after flowering to maintain shape
Can be grown indoors in winter
Deer and rabbit resistant

description.en: A low-growing herb with tiny aromatic leaves. Excellent ground cover for garden paths.
description.fr: Une herbe basse avec de petites feuilles aromatiques. Excellent couvre-sol pour les allees de jardin.

tips: Cut back after flowering
Divide plants every 3-4 years
Tolerates poor soil
Harvest just before flowering for best flavor

description.en: A vigorous spreading herb. Best grown in containers to prevent it from taking over the garden.
description.fr: Une herbe vigoureuse qui s'etend. Mieux cultivee en conteneurs pour l'empecher d'envahir le jardin.

tips: Grow in a pot to control spreading
Harvest regularly to keep compact
Makes excellent tea
Over 600 varieties exist

description.en: A biennial herb with flat or curly leaves. Rich in vitamins and used as garnish worldwide.
description.fr: Une herbe bisannuelle avec des feuilles plates ou frisees. Riche en vitamines et utilisee comme garniture.

tips: Soak seeds overnight for faster germination
Slow to germinate - be patient
Cut outer stalks first
Goes to seed in second year

description.en: A perennial herb with mild onion flavor. Beautiful purple flowers are also edible.
description.fr: Une herbe vivace avec une saveur douce d'oignon. Les belles fleurs violettes sont aussi comestibles.

tips: Cut to 5cm above ground for regrowth
Divide clumps every 3 years
Flowers attract beneficial insects
Freeze chopped chives for winter use

description.en: A woody perennial herb with soft gray-green leaves. Essential for stuffing and sausages.
description.fr: Une herbe vivace ligneuse avec des feuilles gris-vert douces. Essentielle pour les farces et les saucisses.

tips: Replace plants every 4-5 years
Prune woody stems in spring
Drought tolerant once established
Attracts pollinators when flowering

description.en: A robust Mediterranean herb with a warm peppery flavor. Essential in Italian and Greek cuisine.
description.fr: Une herbe mediterraneenne robuste avec une saveur poivree chaude. Essentielle dans la cuisine italienne et grecque.

tips: Flavor intensifies when dried
Cut back hard in spring for fresh growth
Spreads readily - contain if needed
Harvest just before flowers open

description.en: A superfood brassica that becomes sweeter after frost. Extremely hardy and nutritious.
description.fr: Un super-aliment de la famille des brassicas qui devient plus sucre apres le gel. Extremement rustique et nutritif.

tips: Harvest lower leaves first
Frost improves the flavor
Remove yellowing leaves promptly
One of the most nutritious vegetables

description.en: A dual-purpose root crop - both roots and leaves are edible. Rich in folate and manganese.
description.fr: Un legume-racine a double usage - les racines et les feuilles sont comestibles. Riche en folate et manganese.

tips: Each seed cluster produces multiple seedlings - thin early
Harvest when golf ball sized for tenderness

Store in sand for winter use

description.en: A fast-growing root vegetable perfect for autumn planting. Mild peppery flavor.
description.fr: Un legume-racine a croissance rapide parfait pour la plantation d'automne. Saveur poivree douce.

tips: Harvest small for sweetest flavor
Greens are edible and nutritious
Quick crop - ready in just weeks
Tolerates light frost

description.en: A mild-flavored allium that is hardy through winter. Essential for soups and gratins.
description.fr: Un allium a saveur douce qui est rustique tout l'hiver. Essentiel pour les soupes et les gratins.

tips: Plant deep or hill soil for longer white stems
Hardy enough to overwinter in many climates
Transplant when pencil thickness
Wash thoroughly between layers before cooking

description.en: A demanding but rewarding crop. Needs consistent moisture and rich soil to develop crisp stalks.
description.fr: Une culture exigeante mais gratifiante. Necessite une humidite constante et un sol riche.

tips: Needs rich, moisture-retentive soil
Start seeds 10-12 weeks before transplanting
Blanch stems for milder flavor
Never let soil dry out completely

description.en: An annual herb with feathery leaves and aromatic seeds. Essential for pickles and fish dishes.
description.fr: Une herbe annuelle avec des feuilles plumeuses et des graines aromatiques. Essentielle pour les cornichons et les plats de poisson.

tips: Sow directly - does not transplant well
Let some plants go to seed for next year
Attracts beneficial insects
Harvest leaves before flowering for best flavor

description.en: An herb where both leaves and seeds are used. Bolts quickly in hot weather.
description.fr: Une herbe dont les feuilles et les graines sont utilisees. Monte en graines rapidement par temps chaud.

tips: Sow every 3 weeks for continuous supply

Harvest leaves before flower stalks appear
Let some bolt for coriander seeds

description.en: A cheerful giant flower that follows the sun. Seeds are nutritious and attract birds.
description.fr: Une fleur geante joyeuse qui suit le soleil. Les graines sont nutritives et attirent les oiseaux.

Harvest seeds when back of head turns brown

Attracts pollinators to the garden

description.en: A sprawling vine crop with large colorful fruits. Great for soups, pies, and decoration.
description.fr: Une culture rampante avec de grands fruits colores. Ideal pour les soupes, tartes et la decoration.

Pollinate by hand if needed
Harvest before first hard frost

description.en: A heat-loving vine with sweet juicy fruits. Needs long warm summers to mature.
description.fr: Une plante grimpante qui aime la chaleur avec des fruits juteux et sucres. Besoin de longs etes chauds.

tips: Thump test - ripe melons sound hollow

Use black plastic mulch to warm soil

description.en: A perennial berry bush that produces delicious summer and autumn fruits. Easy to grow in most climates.
description.fr: Un arbuste a baies vivace qui produit des fruits delicieux en ete et en automne. Facile a cultiver.

description.en: A colorful leafy green with thick edible stems. Both heat and cold tolerant, very productive.
description.fr: Un legume vert colore avec des tiges epaisses comestibles. Tolerant a la chaleur et au froid, tres productif.

Very heat tolerant compared to spinach
Can overwinter in mild climates

description.en: A fragrant perennial herb with beautiful purple flowers. Attracts pollinators and repels pests.
description.fr: Une herbe vivace parfumee avec de belles fleurs violettes. Attire les pollinisateurs et repousse les nuisibles.

tips: Needs excellent drainage
